violations.description: General food protection. — --Food item was not protected from potential contamination. -Raw vacuum sealed tuna were not thawed according to instructions.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Top pans of foods on speed racks in walk in cooler were not covered/protected. -Cooling smoked meats in walk in freezer were not loosely covered. *Also recommended removing the foil to ensure it does not become brittle during cooling/handling practices.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface used with potentially hazardous food was not cleaned every four hours while in use or as frequently as required. -Fryer seasoning bowl, ice cream scoop in water and spatula in sanitizer at cook line stated as changed out a couple times per day. *Ensure full wash every 4 hours or less.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue build up at interior top vents of the two older make tables. -Dust/debris build up at walk in cooler fans (above speed racks). -Residue build up at blade and surfaces of commercial can opener.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. -Hand sink at cook line has to be turned on with valve below sink.--Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Hand sink at dish pit is not functional, facility is waiting for replacement
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
